chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-4060/2020 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on CMA No.20617/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 31.08.2021 Mr. Ata Muhammad Khan advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG alongwith DSP Legal Raza Mian and SIP Ghani Rehman, PS Gizri................ 1. Urgency granted. Learned counsel for petitioner shall provide copy of judgments to focal person of IGP Sindh within three days. Accordingly, he will communicate the same to concerned authority that shall submit their report in view of acquittal while examining the dictum laid down by this court, To come up on 27.09.2021. J U D G E J U D G E IK
